home.supplierRegions.title: Olùtajà Nípa Àgbègbè
home.industries.title: Ilẹ̀-iṣẹ́ 20+. Tí a Ṣàtúnṣe fún Ètò Ọ́jà Gidi.
home.industries.subtitle: Láti ìṣàkóso àti ìṣelọpọ sí ilé ìwòsàn àti ẹ̀rọ—olùtajà tí a fọwọ́sí lórí ìforúkọsílẹ̀, tí a ṣe àtúnṣe fún ìṣàkóso ilé-iṣẹ́ àti B2B.
home.features.title: Ti kọ fun awọn akoko pataki julọ ni rira
home.features.subtitle: Not a generic contact database. Registry-verified supplier records, landed costs, and structured RFQ workflows — built for industrial procurement teams.
home.showcase.title: Ìmọ̀ Tí Ó Ń Ṣàkóso Àbájáde
home.showcase.subtitle: Ìmúlò pátápátá nípa olùtajà, owó, àti ẹ̀sùn. {{suppliers}} àkọọlẹ—tí a ń túnṣe, tó ga, kì í ṣe àkúnya.
home.howItWorks.badge: Báwo Ni Ó Ṣe Ń Ṣe?
home.howItWorks.title: Láti Àwárí sí Ìpinnu nínú ìṣẹ́jú mẹ́ta
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Ẹ̀kẹta ìgbésẹ̀ mẹ́ta sí ìṣàkóso ọlọ́gbọn. Kò sí ìṣòro. Kàn àbájáde ni.
home.step1.title: Ṣàlàyé Kí Ni O Nìdí
home.step1.desc: Enter commodity, specification, quantity, destination, and lead time. Structured intake — not a keyword marketplace search.
home.step2.title: SmartSeek sourcing operator review
home.step2.desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your request, validates registry provenance, and routes RFQs to verified suppliers only.
home.step3.title: Ṣe Awọn Ipinnu Pẹlu Igberaga
home.step3.desc: Receive structured quotes with MOQ, lead time, Incoterms, and supplier provenance. You decide who to engage.
home.cta.title: Awọn Ipinnu Smart Bẹrẹ Nibi
home.cta.subtitle: Structured RFQ workflows for industrial procurement teams. No fabricated scale claims during beta.
home.cta.footer: Ko si kaadi kirẹditi · Ètò ọfẹ · Fagilee nigbakugba
footer.tagline: Ìmúṣẹ rira ati ìmọ òwò tó ní agbara AI fún àwọn oníra.
footer.designedFor: Olùpèsè àkọ́kọ́. Ìmọ òwò àkọ́kọ́. Gbogbo rẹ̀ jẹ́ fún ẹgbẹ́ rira.
home.feature1.title: Intelligence Ewu
home.feature1.desc: Registry-verified supplier records with procurement-oriented metadata. Risk signals from published registry and trade data — not fabricated scores.
home.feature2.title: Oníṣirò Iye Ti a Gbe Wọle
home.feature2.desc: Gba iye gidi pẹlu awọn ẹtọ, ẹru, iṣeduro, ati awọn iyipada owo. Ijinle oye iṣowo, kii ṣe iṣiro lasan. Ko si awọn idiyele iyanjẹ.
home.feature3.title: Wa Awọn Olura & Awọn itọsọna Iṣowo
home.feature3.desc: {{leads}} awọn olura & awọn itọsọna iṣowo—ti a ṣe ayẹwo nipasẹ AI da lori ifẹ, firmographics, ati awọn ami iṣowo. Kii ṣe itankale ati adura. Data didara, ti a le ṣe itupalẹ fun awọn ẹgbẹ rira.
home.feature4.title: Ibamu Ti o Rọrun
home.feature4.desc: Iwe-ẹri ti a da lori awọn iwe-ẹri, awọn ayẹwo ijẹrisi, ati awọn ilana ifọwọsi. Data didara ibamu ki o le dojukọ ohun ti o ṣe pataki.
home.feature5.title: Data Olupese Kariaye
home.feature5.desc: Gba iraye si {{suppliers}} awọn olupese ti a fọwọsi ati ti a gbẹkẹle kọja awọn orilẹ-ede {{countries}}. Ṣe àlẹmọ nipasẹ ile-iṣẹ, agbegbe, awọn iwe-ẹri. Wa alabaṣiṣẹpọ rẹ ni iṣẹju diẹ.
home.feature6.title: Sourcing reports
home.feature6.desc: Structured supplier comparisons and RFQ-ready specification summaries for procurement teams.
home.industry1.title: Iṣelọpọ & Awọn ohun alumọni
home.industry1.desc: Antimony, tin, lithium, cobalt, copper, ati awọn ohun alumọni to ṣọwọn. Awọn olupese ohun alumọni ti a fọwọsi fun awọn pq ipese pataki.
home.industry2.title: Iṣelọpọ & Iṣowo
home.industry2.desc: Orisun awọn ohun elo aise, awọn ẹya, ati awọn ohun elo lati ọdọ awọn olupese ti a fọwọsi ni gbogbo agbaye.
home.industry3.title: Eletoroni & Imọ-ẹrọ
home.industry3.desc: Wa awọn olupese semiconductor, awọn olupese PCB, ati awọn pinpin ẹya imọ-ẹrọ.
home.industry4.title: Awọn ọja Onibara & Iṣowo
home.industry4.desc: Sopọ pẹlu awọn olupese fun apoti, awọn ọja ti pari, ati awọn ọja aami ikọkọ.
home.industry5.title: Iṣelọpọ ọkọ ayọkẹlẹ & Itransport
home.industry5.desc: Orisun awọn ẹya ọkọ ayọkẹlẹ, awọn ẹya OEM, ati awọn ohun elo gbigbe ni kariaye.
home.industry6.title: Ilera & Awọn ẹrọ iṣoogun
home.industry6.desc: Wa awọn olupese ti o ni ibamu pẹlu FDA fun awọn ẹrọ iṣoogun ati awọn ọja ilera.
home.industry7.title: Ikole & Awọn ohun elo
home.industry7.desc: Orisun awọn ohun elo ikole, awọn ohun elo to lagbara, ati awọn ipese ikole.
persona.procurers.headline: Dinku eewu. Mu awọn anfani pọ. Duro ni ibamu.
persona.procurers.subline: Registry-verified supplier discovery, landed cost tools, and operator-routed RFQs for procurement teams.
persona.entrepreneurs.headline: Wa yara. Ṣiṣapẹẹrẹ smart. Bẹrẹ ni kutukutu.
persona.entrepreneurs.subline: Wa awọn aṣelọpọ ti a fọwọsi ni iṣẹju, kii ṣe ọsẹ. Iye owo ti o yẹ fun ibẹrẹ pẹlu awọn irinṣẹ ipele ile-iṣẹ.
persona.suppliers.headline: Gba idanimọ. Gba awọn RFQ diẹ diẹ.
persona.suppliers.subline: Darapọ mọ {{suppliers}} awọn aṣelọpọ ti a fọwọsi. Gba ibeere awọn onra ti o ni ẹtọ ati gbatilẹ business iṣowo rẹ.
persona.producers.headline: Ṣakoso idiyele. Ṣiṣẹda didara. Yatọ si awọn orisun.
persona.producers.subline: Ikọja ohun elo, wiwọn idiyele, ati iyatọ awọn aṣelọpọ fun awọn olori iṣelọpọ.
methodology.title: Bawo ni a ṣe n ṣayẹwo awọn aṣelọpọ
methodology.subtitle: Ifojusi ninu ilana wa n kọ igbẹkẹle. Eyi ni bi a ṣe n ṣe idaniloju otitọ data.
methodology.step1.title: Ikọja data
methodology.step1.desc: A kojọpọ data awọn aṣelọpọ lati awọn iwe aṣẹ iṣowo, awọn ijẹrisi, ati awọn orisun iṣowo ti a fọwọsi. Ilana aworan awọn aṣelọpọ agbaye ti a mu ṣiṣẹ nigbagbogbo.
methodology.step2.title: Ijẹrisi
methodology.step2.desc: Gbogbo aṣelọpọ ni a ṣe ayẹwo awọn ayẹwo iforukọsilẹ iṣowo, idaniloju itan iṣowo, ati atunyẹwo ibamu. Ni atilẹyin iwe aṣẹ, ipo ibamu.
methodology.step3.title: Iwọn Didara
methodology.step3.desc: Awọn algoridimu wa n dani awọn aṣelọpọ lori akoko idahun, ipele ijẹrisi, ati esi awọn onra. Iye AI, ifihan-giga.
methodology.step4.title: Iṣakoso ti nlọ lọwọ
methodology.step4.desc: A n ṣakoso awọn ami eewu nigbagbogbo ati mu ipo awọn aṣelọpọ wa da lori data akoko gidi. Iwa ti a fọwọsi, oye ti a ṣe atilẹyin nipasẹ iwe aṣẹ.
integrationsPage.title: Sopọ SmartSeek pẹlu Irinṣẹ Rẹ
integrationsPage.subtitle: Ṣe ẹyọ, RFQs, ati iye idiyele pọ pẹlu awọn ọna rira ati ERP rẹ. OAuth ni bọtini kan, API ailewu, ati awọn asopọ ti a kọ tẹlẹ.
integrationsPage.supported: Awọn Asopọ ti a ṣe atilẹyin
integrationsPage.supportedDesc: Sopọ awọn irinṣẹ rira ti o wa tẹlẹ. Data wa ni ibamu laifọwọyi.
integrationsPage.signInToConnect: Bawo ni lati buwọlu lati sopọ
integrationsPage.howItWorks: Bawo ni o ṣe n ṣiṣẹ
integrationsPage.step1Desc: Yan SAP Ariba, Oracle, Salesforce, tabi awọn omiiran lati inu atokọ.
integrationsPage.step2Desc: Ilana OAuth 2.0—ko si ọrọ igbaniwọle ti a pin. A ṣe atilẹyin SSO ile-iṣẹ.
integrationsPage.step3Desc: Awọn aṣelọpọ, RFQs, ati data idiyele nṣan laarin awọn ọna ni akoko gidi.
integrationsPage.securityDesc: Buyer and supplier data is handled confidentially. TLS in transit, encryption at rest. SOC 2 attestation is in progress — we do not claim certifications we have not completed.
integrationsPage.allPlatforms: Gbogbo awọn pẹpẹ ti a ṣe atilẹyin

home.hero.badge: Intelligence ipamọ fun awọn ẹgbẹ rira
home.hero.title1: Mọ iye gidi ti o wa ni ilẹ ṣaaju ki o to ṣe ifaramọ
home.hero.subtitleBase: Wa awọn olupese, ṣe iṣiro iye gidi ti gbigbe (irinna, aṣa, owo-ori, ilẹ), ki o si pinnu pẹlu igboya.
home.hero.subtitleHighlight: awọn wakati, kii ṣe awọn ọsẹ.
home.hero.painLine: Dena ifiweranṣẹ-ìmeeli tutu. Dena iṣiro awọn idiyele. Dena iyalẹnu ni aṣa.
home.hero.searchPlaceholder: Wa awọn olupese nipasẹ ohun elo, ilana, agbegbe, tabi iwe-ẹri
home.hero.chip1: Ko si kaadi kirẹditi ti a nilo
home.hero.chip3: Data ti a fọwọsi lati ọpọlọpọ orisun
home.hero.statSuppliers: Awọn ile-iṣẹ ti a ṣe akojọ
home.integrations.label: Nṣiṣẹ pẹlu awọn irinṣẹ ti ẹgbẹ rira rẹ ti lo tẹlẹ
home.feat1.quote: "A n lo ọsẹ mẹta lati fi imeeli ranṣẹ si awọn olupese ti ko dahun — ati pe a tun pari pẹlu awọn ti ko tọ."
home.feat1.title: Wa awọn olupese ti a fọwọsi ni awọn iṣẹju diẹ
home.feat1.desc: Awọn olubasọrọ ti a fọwọsi lati awọn olupese {{suppliers}} pupọ. Ti a ṣe ayẹwo lati awọn iwe-ẹri ile-iṣẹ, awọn ipilẹ data iṣowo, ati awọn orisun ẹgbẹ kẹta.
home.feat1.b1: Imeeli & foonu wa — ko si iwadii
home.feat1.b2: Ṣe àlẹmọ nipasẹ iwe-ẹri, orilẹ-ede, MOQ, awọn oṣiṣẹ
home.feat2.quote: "A ti ṣe isuna $42k. Iwe isanwo sọ $61k. Iyato naa ni awọn ẹru ti a ko mọ pe o wa."
home.feat2.title: Mọ iye gidi rẹ ṣaaju ki o to ṣe ileri
home.feat2.desc: Awọn ẹru, gbigbe, iṣeduro, owo ibudo, VAT — ti ṣe iṣiro ni iwaju. Ko si iyalẹnu nigbati apoti ba de.
home.feat2.b1: Wiwa koodu HS & awọn oṣuwọn ẹru laaye
home.feat2.b2: Iṣowo FCL/LCL, afẹfẹ, ifijiṣẹ ni akawe
home.feat2.b3: Iṣowo orisun orilẹ-ede pupọ ni akawe
home.feat2.cta: Ṣe iṣiro iye ti a gbe wọle
home.feat3.quote: "Olutaja wa ti o ga julọ wa ni agbegbe kan ti o di alaimuṣinṣin. A ko ni eto imuduro ati pe a padanu awọn ọsẹ 6 ti iṣelọpọ."
home.feat3.title: Ṣawari ewu olutaja ṣaaju ki o to jẹ ki o jẹ idiyele fun ọ
home.feat3.desc: Tẹle awọn ifihan ewu orisun ni gbogbo olutaja ati awọn agbegbe ṣaaju ki wọn to di awọn iyalẹnu ti o ni idiyele.
home.feat3.b1: Awọn itọkasi ewu olutaja ati orilẹ-ede ni iwo kan
home.feat3.b2: Awọn asia geopolitical & ibamu ni akoko gidi
home.feat3.b3: Awọn aṣayan ti a daba laifọwọyi
home.pain.stat1desc: Akoko apapọ ti awọn ẹgbẹ rira n lo lori iwadi olutaja ọwọ
home.pain.stat2desc: Iye ti a ṣe iṣiro ti a padanu ni ọdun kan fun ile-iṣẹ kọọkan nitori awọn idiyele wọle ti a ko ri ati awọn yiyan olutaja ti ko dara
home.pain.stat3desc: Iwọn idinku idiyele ti a ṣe ijabọ nipasẹ awọn olumulo SmartSeek ni awọn ọjọ 90 akọkọ wọn
home.pain.footnote: Awọn olumulo SmartSeek n lọ lati 14 wakati ti iwadi ọsẹ kan si kere ju 2. Iyẹn ni awọn wakati 12 pada — gbogbo ọsẹ.
home.hiw.badge: Bawo ni o ṣe n ṣiṣẹ
home.hiw.title: Lati iwadi si adehun ni awọn ọjọ — kii ṣe awọn oṣu
home.hiw.step1.title: Wa
home.hiw.step1.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers by commodity, region, and specification. Matches include registry provenance — not scraped contact lists.
home.hiw.step2.title: Ka
home.hiw.step2.desc: Wo iye gidi ti o wa ni ilẹ̀ ni ìṣẹ́jú mẹta. Ṣe afiwe awọn olupese nipa iye lapapọ ti a fi ranṣẹ, kii ṣe idiyele ẹyọkan nikan.
home.hiw.step3.title: Pinnu
home.hiw.step3.desc: Submit structured RFQs reviewed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator. Quotes return with MOQ, lead time, and Incoterms.

home.pricing.subtitle: Igbeyewo ọfẹ ọjọ 14 · Ko si kaadi kirẹditi ti a beere · Ipadabọ kikun ti ko ba ni itẹlọrun
home.pricing.tierFreeDesc: Wa awọn olupese, awọn esi 3 fun ibeere
home.pricing.tierProDesc: Iwadi ailopin, iṣiro iye ti a de, gbigbe — igbeyewo ọfẹ ọjọ 14

home.integrations.sectionDesc: Ṣopọ awọn olupese, awọn itọsọna, ati data orisun taara sinu ERP, CRM, ati awọn ọna ṣiṣe rira rẹ. Ko si awọn ikojọpọ ọwọ.
home.demo.badge: Ifihan laaye — Ko si ibeere iforukọsilẹ
home.demo.desc: Search registry-verified suppliers across industrial categories. Preview results are curated; full directory access is available to founding users during beta.
home.demo.placeholder: Gbiyanju: "onise aṣọ owu Turkey" tabi "panẹli oorun China"
home.demo.suppliersFound: awọn olupese ti a rii — n fihan 3 awọn esi ọfẹ
home.demo.enterProduct: Tẹ eyikeyi ọja, ohun elo, tabi ile-iṣẹ loke
home.demo.clickQuick: Tabi tẹ aiyara kan lati wo awọn esi lẹsẹkẹsẹ
home.demo.noCreditCard: Ko si kaadi kirẹditi ti a nilo
home.demo.moreSuppliers: {{count}} awọn olupese diẹ sii ti a rii
home.demo.freeUnlocks: Beta accounts unlock the full supplier directory and verified contact details where available.
home.capabilities.title: Ẹrọ oye mẹta. Pẹpẹ kan.
home.capabilities.subtitle: From verified supplier discovery to structured RFQ workflows — built for procurement teams.
home.capabilities.findSuppliersDesc: Wa awọn olupese agbaye ti a fọwọsi nipasẹ ọja, orilẹ-ede, iwe-ẹri, ati iwọn. Ti ṣetan lati kan si pẹlu awọn ami didara.
home.capabilities.findLeadsDesc: Awọn itọsọna onibara ati iṣowo ti o ni agbara. Ṣe àlẹmọ nipasẹ ifẹ, ile-iṣẹ, agbegbe, ati iwọn ile-iṣẹ. Ti kọ fun ibaraẹnisọrọ B2B.
home.capabilities.findLeadsChip1: Awọn itọsọna ti o ni ifẹ giga
home.capabilities.aiIntelDesc: Registry provenance, landed cost estimates, and structured quote comparison for procurement decisions.
home.searchPlaceholder: Wa awọn olupese agbaye ti a fọwọsi...
home.trust.operatorRouting: Iṣakoso RFQ ti a ṣe ayẹwo nipasẹ awọn oṣiṣẹ
home.trust.structuredQuotes: Awọn aaye ikowe ti a ṣe ilana (MOQ, akoko ifijiṣẹ, Incoterms)
home.trustBlock.badge: Ti kọ fun awọn iṣowo to ṣe pataki
home.trustBlock.heading: Data gidi. Awọn idiyele gidi. Awọn ipinnu gidi.
home.trustBlock.body: SmartSeek connects you to registry-backed supplier records and the full landed cost picture — not just unit prices. Built by cross-border sourcing operators, not a marketplace listing team.
home.trustBlock.bullet1: Awọn igbasilẹ olupese ti a da lori iwe-ẹri, ko si awọn asọtẹlẹ ti a gba
home.trustBlock.bullet2: Gbogbo idiyele ti a gbe: ẹru, aṣa, owo-ori, ilẹ — gbogbo wọn ni
home.trustBlock.bullet3: Awọn ọna asopọ taara si awọn orisun ile-iṣẹ ati awọn olubasọrọ
home.trustBlock.cta: Request beta access — founding member pricing when paid plans launch
home.hero.banner: Ọfẹ nigba beta · Ẹgbẹ ikẹkọ ipese ṣi silẹ
home.hero.subtitle: Wa awọn olupese ti a fọwọsi fun awọn irin pataki ati awọn ohun elo ile-iṣẹ. Fi RFQ ranṣẹ ki o si gba awọn ẹyọ ti a ṣe eto pẹlu MOQ, akoko ifijiṣẹ, ati Incoterms lati ọdọ awọn olupese ti o ni oye.
home.hero.builtFor: Ti kọ fun awọn ẹgbẹ rira ile-iṣẹ ti n ṣiṣẹ pẹlu awọn ilana rira ti o da lori awọn pato.
home.how.title: Ilana rira laisi ariwo ọja
home.how.step1Desc: Ṣalaye ohun ti o nilo: ọja, pato, iye, ibi-afẹde, akoko ifijiṣẹ. O gba iṣẹju 2.
home.how.step2Title: A n tọka si awọn olupese ti a fọwọsi
home.how.step2Desc: A SmartSeek sourcing operator screens your RFQ and routes it only to suppliers verified against public company registries.
home.how.step3Title: Iwọ yoo gba awọn ẹyọ ti a ṣe eto
home.how.step3Desc: Awọn ẹyọ wa pẹlu awọn incoterms, akoko ifijiṣẹ, MOQ, ati ipilẹ olupese. Iwọ ni o pinnu ẹni ti iwọ yoo ba ṣiṣẹ.
home.why.title: Ko si awọn profaili ti a fa. Ko si awọn ifilọlẹ pupọ. Ko si iṣere ọja.
home.why.body: Every supplier we publish is checked against a company registry — SAIC, Companies House, SEC EDGAR, Handelsregister, MERSIS, ASIC, KRS, DART, SEDAR — and confirmed via direct contact. RFQs are routed by a SmartSeek sourcing operator, not by an algorithm.
home.why.pill1: Ijerisi ti o da lori iwe-ẹri
home.why.pill3: Olubasọrọ taara pẹlu olupese, ko si aṣoju
home.founding.body: A n ṣe ifọwọsowọpọ pẹlu ẹgbẹ awọn olutaja kan pato ni akoko beta ki gbogbo akọọlẹ le gba atilẹyin taara fun rira ati yiyara ni itọsọna awọn olupese.
home.preview.lockTitle: Iwe itọsọna kikun wa fun awọn olumulo ipilẹ
home.preview.lockBody: O free ni akoko beta. A n gba awọn olura ni ọwọ, nitorinaa gbogbo akọọlẹ n gba atilẹyin rira.
home.sections.previewTitle: Awọn olupese ti a jẹrisi ni gbogbo awọn ile-iṣẹ ati awọn ọja kariaye
home.sections.previewBody: A sample of registry-verified suppliers across metals, manufacturing, chemicals, packaging, and machinery. Full directory unlocked for founding users during beta.
home.how.badge: Bawo ni o ṣe n ṣiṣẹ
home.trustStrip.noFabricated: Ko si awọn profaili ti a ṣẹda
home.founding.noPayment: Ko si kaadi kirẹditi. Ko si eto isanwo lakoko beta.
home.seo.description: Operator-led industrial sourcing platform with registry-verified suppliers, structured RFQs, and strong metals expertise.
